notes:
I entered into an empty game and a full game room my graphics were on the minimum.
On the empty game room it was ok, generally speaking, it's playable but on my laptop, I experienced stuttering while walking.
On the full game room, I experienced FPS drops a lot almost all the time.
I suspect that my laptop just can't handle that game good enough but I could be wrong and maybe it is lagging for everyone.
Beside that runs perfectly fine, no connection issues or crashes.
title: BLOCKADE 3D

notes: Works perfectly out of the box (no mouse drift)
